response:
Subject: Mandatory QAQC Audit at [Project Name] Office – [Date]

Dear [Recipient Name/Title],

With reference to the email below and the instructions issued by [Regulatory Authority], [Client Name] and the [Consultant Name] will be conducting a mandatory QAQC audit at the [Contractor Name] office on [Date].

This audit is a requirement from [Regulatory Authority] and is mandatory for you to commence work on this project.

Please arrange the necessary preparations and confirm your availability via email at your earliest convenience.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]
